channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: How the world failed Ryan and Yaman
item.description: An Israeli strike killed my children. What pains me is not just their loss but also the normalisation of their murder.

item.title: Ukraine’s forcibly transferred children must not be a bargaining chip
item.description: Russia must face more pressure to fulfil its legal obligations to return the Ukrainian children.

item.title: Residents flee Beirut’s southern suburbs as Israel orders strikes
item.description: Videos show gridlocked traffic in the southern suburbs of Beirut as residents rushed to evacuate the Dahiyeh area.

item.title: How could El Nino reshape tropical storms around the world this year?
item.description: El Nino tends to reduce hurricanes in the Atlantic while increasing storms in the Pacific Ocean.

item.title: Greece reopens Syrian and Afghan asylum cases, hoping for returns
item.description: Greece's migration minister recently said Athens does not share common values with 'hardcore Islam'.

item.title: England World Cup 2026 team preview: Players to watch, group and squad list
item.description: England cruised through qualifying, but some fans are concerned over the squad selection and the form against top teams.

item.title: French Navy seizes Russian oil tanker
item.description: French Navy seizes Russian oil tanker

item.title: What is Lebanon’s Beaufort Castle, and why has Israel captured it?
item.description: The fortress, a historical battleground, is playing a central role in Israel’s military campaign against Hezbollah.

item.title: Kuwait condemns Iranian attack as Iran-US trade new strikes
item.description: Kuwait activated its air defences after what its foreign ministry later described as a ‘heinous Iranian attack’.

item.title: French navy, backed by the UK, intercepts Russian oil tanker
item.description: According to France, the tanker, which had sailed from Murmansk, was trying to 'skirt international sanctions'.

item.title: Ethiopia holds elections with PM Abiy’s party expected to dominate
item.description: Voting will not take place in northern Tigray region and some parts of the Amhara region amid insecurity.

item.title: Israel bombs a beloved Lebanese landmark, chef Husen Fayad’s restaurant
item.description: Israel destroyed Arch Almoulouk, a resort and restaurant owned by famous Lebanese chef Husen Fayad in Wadi al-Hujeir.

item.title: US, Iran trade new attacks amid talks: Here’s what we know
item.description: Washington and Tehran are attacking each other despite a ceasefire that came into effect on April 8.

item.title: Ultra-Orthodox Jewish demonstrators storm Israeli police station
item.description: Ultra-Orthodox Jewish demonstrators storm Israeli police station

item.title: Which football rule changes will be implemented during the World Cup?
item.description: Red cards for covering mouths, corner kicks for time wasting and broadened use of VAR technology will be implemented.

item.title: Iran’s IRGC launches retaliatory strike after US attacks
item.description: Kuwait, which hosts US forces, says its defence systems intercepted missiles and drones amid sirens across the country.

item.title: Political commentators Cenk, Piker say UK bars them over Israel remarks
item.description: The US citizens allege that they have been denied entry to Britain due to their outspoken criticism of Israel.

item.title: Vinicius brings Maracana curtain-raiser to life as Brazil rout Panama 6-2
item.description: Christian Pulisic breaks goal drought as US beat Senegal 3-2 in international friendly ahead of World Cup.

item.title: Lebanese start fleeing south Beirut after Israel says will target the area
item.description: The Israeli government says it has given the army orders to attack the southern suburbs of the capital.

item.title: Iran war day 94: US strikes Iranian sites; Kuwait intercepts missiles
item.description: While a peace deal between the US and Iran remains elusive, Israel has deepened its offensive into southern Lebanon.

item.title: Tense election night in Colombia as country heads to presidential runoff
item.description: Colombia’s election heads to a June 21 runoff after a tight first round between de la Espriella and Cepeda.

item.title: Israel airstrike kills at least two Palestinians at Gaza port
item.description: At least two Palestinians were killed and around a dozen wounded when an Israeli air strike hit a crowded cafe.

item.title: Ex-US Fed Chair Powell warns against politicisation amid Trump’s attacks
item.description: Jerome Powell says the US central bank is undergoing a 'stress test' like other institutions in the current era.

item.title: Sheinbaum accuses US of ‘interference’ amid probe of Mexican officials
item.description: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum has accused the United States of interfering in Mexico’s internal affairs.

item.title: US says ban on AI chip shipments applies to Chinese firms outside China
item.description: Department of Commerce issues guidance on chip restrictions amid concerns about loopholes in export control regime.
